nefiracetam.dose_note: NOTE: The drug is typically divided into three doses. Roughly 0.5mg-1.6mg/kg.
nefiracetam.name: nefiracetam

properties.dose: Common: 150-450mg. | NOTE: The drug is typically divided into three doses. Roughly 0.5mg-1.6mg/kg.
properties.summary: Nootropic compound of the racetam family. The drug is reported to enhance both GABAergic and cholinergic signaling. Long-term use is suggested to be neuroprotective. The drug is fat soluble.
